feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: whoa the dyel bites back
entry.content: whoa the dyel bites back

entry.title: /b/ Random: reminder
entry.content: reminder

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Hunter HL2 Appreciation
entry.content: >Memorable introduction >Cool design that utilizes the setting and context of the world >Formidable, but not aggravating to fight >You can use its flechettes against it, while using one of the main selling points of the game (Gravity Gun) >If push comes to shove, you can always just shoot the damn thing >Great and iconic sound design It is a shame that hunters only appear in Episode 2. Would've given the base game significantly more enemy variety.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: what happened to progchan?
entry.content: I am 99% sure i saw progchan on /g/, whether it be a ad or someone posted a link in a thread a few months ago, which is why i started browsing and posting on it. progchan has been down for like a month now, at least? is it coming back? i keep checking weekly... anyone associated with it here lurking on /g/ who can give me more info, and if its coming back?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I don’t care about your feelings. I don’t care about your “mindfulness”. I don’t…
entry.content: I don’t care about your feelings. I don’t care about your “mindfulness”. I don’t care about your years of sensitivity training that was forced on you during Covid. I don’t give a single solitary fucking shit if Los Angeles and all its smog and all its methamphetamine made you more “enlightened”. I don’t give a shit if you think wrecking your boss’s relationship with his girlfriend of five years because she didn’t like her is in any way acceptable just because “she’s hot”. You deserve misery. You

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8359 Eventuality Edition Previous Thread: >>83913127 F-l…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8359 Eventuality Edition Previous Thread: >>83913127 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: one of my earliest memories is putting handfuls of pennies in my mouth, to find …
entry.content: one of my earliest memories is putting handfuls of pennies in my mouth, to find the chocolate ones. my uncle gave me a real chocolate penny and told me there could be more, and let me into the piggy bank. i sucked on every penny looking for the chocolate ones but never found another. this is how 90's uncles trolled u.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To the Brazil Anon
entry.content: You can only expect sympathy (or empathy) from others if you are capable of expressing it towards others. If the only stuff you are capable of expressing are a superficial admiration of a very specific group of people, and unfettered, vitriolic hatred towards the vast majority of all humans, then do not expect any good feelings to come towards you. I can empathize with people who feel alone and are in unwelcoming or poor conditions, but not with people who mainly express feelings of hatred towar

entry.title: /o/ Auto: The ideal car
entry.content: Is a light-weight electrical coupé with minimum amount of tracking and the only thing it has is a basic GPS and Spotify on a small screen. Minimum amount of components. Minimum amount of ridiculous technology. Maximum freedom, reliability and RWD power. No need for engine maintenance, no need for yearly services. A car that's truly yours. The only thing that may kill it will be corrosion a few decades down the line.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Post musicians who did great humanitarian work
entry.content: Mike Love's The Beach Boys, quickly gained popularity with their unique sound and became the face of America. But for Mike, it was more than just making good music, it was about sending out a message of love, unity & harmony. It was in the late 60s, during the peak of the civil rights movement, that Love truly emerged as a fearless advocate for anti-racism. He wrote and composed a song called "Student Demonstration Time" which highlighted the struggles and sacrifices of Blacks fighting for their

entry.title: /g/ Technology: firefox vs vivaldi
entry.content: hello preface this is going to be a really dumb question but i used vivaldi and then on a whim i decided to try firefox and i found a cute miku skin for it. but my bf was very insistent about continuing to use vivaldi (he uses brave so idk). like he was actively asking me all of my gripes with it and when i said it felt clunky and slow he went through all of the options to try and make it better. and then when i told him i liked the skin i found on firefox he just said “they have them for vivald

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Natalie Merchant has her own prosaic prosody, with off-kilter guitar accentuatin…
entry.content: Natalie Merchant has her own prosaic prosody, with off-kilter guitar accentuating its eccentric undertow. The whole second side makes politics not love, and sometimes--like when the lottery-playing mom of "Dust Bowl" rubs her fevered youngest down with rubbing alcohol--she brings you there. But somehow I knew that when she got down to cases she'd still be a fuzzy-wuzzy. This is a woman whose song about Africa (called "Hateful Hate," now there's a resonant phrase) brushes by slavery on its way to

entry.title: /g/ Technology: A YouTube channel just revealed that they get $0.002 per YouTube ad shown, that …
entry.content: A YouTube channel just revealed that they get $0.002 per YouTube ad shown, that means that a YouTube premium subscriber would have to watch 7000 videos a month before they become lossmaking to Youtube. It's obvious now that Youtube is working harder than ever to make you watch the ads, as there are approximately 20 million adblocking Firefox users alone, which adds up fast. Expect Youtube to create a DRM scheme that requires verified ad views soon that can't be cryptographically bypassed. Ublock

entry.title: /g/ Technology: im genuinely concerned about the future
entry.content: For 2 thirds of my life. Having a pc was a huge part of my life. Now with inflation, demand price increases and just overall changes to the world structure. Be it ai, cloud computing, surveillance state digital ids etc. I am increasingly worried i will never own a pc again once mine breaks. I stay up at night thinking about this. That i will never own a home. Be priced out of even food that i like. And that if i want a pc its either get rid of my down-payment for a house thats reducing in purcha

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The Binding of Isaac doesn't have permadeath
entry.content: Permadeath is the loss of all progression, that's what separates it from normal death. The Binding of Isaac has a set of levels, which if you beat, you get a new set of levels. The set of levels could alternatively be interpreted as a level of levels, or a world like from mario. When you die, you only get sent back to your last checkpoint, rather than starting all over. If The Binding of Isaac had permadeath, you would be sent back to the very first set of levels and have to beat all of the set

entry.title: /b/ Random: that "injection of an anti-psychotic into my body" appointment i have scheduled …
entry.content: that "injection of an anti-psychotic into my body" appointment i have scheduled in a couple days can't come soon enough...this is fucked, i am not doing well right now...is this really supposed to be the rest of my life? just taking meds and going to get that injection every month? forever? that can't possibly be true, especially after my parents kick the bucket, at which point i'm sure i'll abandon the whole notion of trying to be functional and go find real drugs...i've been meaning to do that

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Splinter Cell Remake leak
entry.content: >Slated for Q2-Q4 2027, project in a “fragile state right now” >Non lethal choices being expanded upon >Fully linear >Dynamic light shooting with light/dark meter >Snow Drop Engine (Division/Avatar/Outlaws) >Sticky cameras & gas grenades >Manual alarms and destructible enviroments >Pipe slides & zip lines

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >A new report claims Sony caught many publishers, retailers, and business partne…
entry.content: >A new report claims Sony caught many publishers, retailers, and business partners off guard with its decision to stop making physical PlayStation games in 2028. >According to the report, many partners only learned of it after Sony made the announcement public. One executive at a major AAA publisher said >“Despite our seemingly close working relationship with PlayStation, we weren’t informed that this was happening.” “It’s only hitting us now that we may be out of jobs sooner rather than later.”

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: cereal experiment thread
entry.content: I tried chocolate pillows but instead of milk in the bowl with them I used chilled caramel coffee, because I don't have milk I thought it might make something tasty with the coffee caramel and chocolate all together Sadly it was not that tasty, the bitterness of the coffee did not pair well with the chocolatey cereal

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Albums you relate to?
entry.content: The first time I listened to Kendrick Lamar’s-Good Kid M.A.A.D City, I spent half the album looking up at the ceiling, saying “wow” under bated breath, and the other half shaking from the flashbacks of my M.A.A.D city, in which, I was of course, a good kid. Anyone relate to what I’m talking about?

entry.content: >Maid cleanup Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /mu/ Music: What does /mu/ think of Orgcore?
entry.content: I'll be honest, I love this genre. As a late gen xer (born in 1979) this shit really resonates with me. I was also born, and raised in the Gainsville area, so I go to the "fest" every year. Hot Water Music are my favorite band.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: a 26 year old rollersk8 is worth $10k kiwi coins

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Shortwave radio
entry.content: Just bought a XHDATA D219 for 11$, pretty highly reviewed on the Internet for it's price. Obviously I would buy something more expensive if I could but it is what it is. Never used shortwave radio before but I've recently become really fascinated by radio for some reason so I got one. Where do I get started? Do you have any pieces of advice? Also feel free to use this thread for general discussion around shortwave.

entry.title: /b/ Random: if i was technically brain-dead but something else outside of my body was keepin…
entry.content: if i was technically brain-dead but something else outside of my body was keeping me alive, how could i tell? i suspect i may already be dead and might actually be experiencing some form of "psychosomatic reality", as i would call it...a "reality" that technically doesn't exist, but is as good as real to the first-person observer...i also suspect everything i say and do is being recorded somehow

entry.title: /b/ Random: is it possible for someone to do hallucinogens, go on a trip, and become so imme…
entry.content: is it possible for someone to do hallucinogens, go on a trip, and become so immersed in the trip that they actually just become permanently stuck in that new world? how likely is this, and is it something that would even be possible? because i feel as if my whole life up to this point has been some kind of drug trip and i've just been hallucinating this whole time, although i can't prove that.
